column1:
'Has your brother gone out?' Mum asked me.

Mum asked me if my brother_____________out.

'Do you know the answer?' Miss Smith asked Ruby.

Miss Smith asked Ruby if she______________the answer.

'Is this your car?' the police officer said to the man. 

The police officer asked the man if it__________his car.

'Have you been to see the exhibition?' I asked Benjamin. 

I asked Benjamin if he_______________to see the exhibition.

'Does your laptop need a new battery?' Jerry asked me. 

Jerry asked me if my laptop______________a new battery.

'Are you having barbecue?' I asked the Browns. 

I asked the Browns if they______________a berbecue.
